strName.description: The code name of the condition trigger, as referred to in other files.

strCondName.description: Name of the condition this trigger sets — refers to entry within conditions.json

aReqs.description: Conditions that must be present for this trigger to fire — each refers to entry within conditions.json

aForbids.description: Conditions that must NOT be present for this trigger to fire — each refers to entry within conditions.json

aTriggers.description: Other condition triggers chained by this one — each refers to entry within condtrigs.json
